title: Paul Highton
extract: Paul Highton (born 10 November 1976) is a former Wales international rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at representative level for Great Britain (Academy), and Wales, and at club level for Waterhead A.R.L.F.C. (in Oldham), Halifax/Halifax Blue Sox, Featherstone Rovers, Salford City Reds and Oldham, as a prop, second-row or loose forward.
